text: Healthy living is about more than just eating well. It involves a balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, as well as regular exercise, such as walking or cycling, for at least 30 minutes a day. Equally important is getting enough sleep—around seven to nine hours each night—to let your body and brain recover. Looking after your mental health is also crucial, which means managing stress, connecting with others, and taking time for hobbies you enjoy. Finally, maintaining a good work-life balance helps prevent burnout. When you make these habits part of your routine, you feel better both physically and emotionally.
